meaning: n.广阔的地面,土地,地方,地域,(解剖)管道,小册子
examples: Foods are broken down in the digestive tract.
A vast tract of land is ready for development.
She produced a feminist tract, "Comments on Birth-Control," in 1930.
He went to a urologist, who ruled out any bladder or urinary tract problems.
"Grossology, " a 32-foot walk through digestive tract, will open to the public this spring.
